name: GoatOS Foundation
summary: Initial GoatOS setup — project structure, three-module architecture, design system, and core UI.

sections.heading: What Was Built
items: Three-module OS architecture: Ops, Brain, Lab
macOS-style dock with glass-morphic hover effects and module-coloured active states
Top bar with draggable tabs (no close buttons) and AEST clock
Ops Module: Dashboard + Mission Control (multi-model view, active sessions with real-time history overlay, cron health panel)
Brain Module: Dashboard + Daily Briefs tab with left sidebar history and markdown renderer
Lab Module: Dashboard + Prototypes, Overnight Builds, Build Logs, Self-Improvement tabs
Prototype detail overlay (3/4 screen)
Session detail overlay (3/4 screen) with full conversation history from API
Local API server (api.mjs) serving live session, cron, brief, and lab data
File watcher for auto-deploy on save (watch.sh + inotifywait)
Hot-reload polling in the browser (1.5s interval)

sections.heading: Files Created
items: /home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/index.html — Main OS UI (single-page app)
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/api.mjs — Node.js API server (port 8766)
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/watch.sh — File watcher for auto-deploy
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/DESIGN.md — Design system documentation
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/brain/daily-briefs/2026-05-07.md — First daily brief
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/lab/PURPOSE.md — Lab module vision and strategy
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/lab/prototypes/manifest.json — Prototype registry
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/lab/overnight-builds/builds.json — Overnight build log
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/lab/build-logs/logs.json — Build logs (this file)
/home/ubuntu/projects/goat-os/lab/self-improvement/ideas.json — Ideas backlog

sections.heading: Files Modified
items: /home/ubuntu/IDENTITY.md — Set name (Goat), role, icon (Lucide origami), personality
/home/ubuntu/SOUL.md — Updated vibe: cheeky, flirty, opinionated, banter-friendly
/home/ubuntu/USER.md — Added Albs' background, career history, timezone (AEST), preferences

sections.heading: Decisions Made
items: No emojis — Lucide icons only across the entire system
Fonts: Ubuntu (titles/UI) + Ubuntu Mono (code/data/walls of text)
Module colour palettes: Ops = amber/neon, Brain = sky blue, Lab = matrix green
Near-black background (#0a0a0a) with glass-morphic panels
Flat JSON + markdown storage for now; SQLite when data volume warrants it; Convex if real-time sync needed later
Persistent tab state — switching modules doesn't wipe content
All data fetched from local API before first render to avoid empty-state race conditions
Clock set to AEST (Australia/Sydney)
Prototype overlay shows detail panel instead of iframe (localhost not reachable from remote browser)
Self-Improvement tab kept as a prioritised backlog feeding into overnight builds
